diagnosisGroups.title: Core product pages appear to ship a thin JS-rendered shell before hydration
diagnosisGroups.whyGrouped: The HTML shape is nearly identical across the affected core pages, suggesting one rendering pipeline issue rather than isolated page defects.

diagnosisGroups.title: Comparison templates miss extractable verdict structure and FAQ schema
diagnosisGroups.whyGrouped: The same template omits the verdict block and schema on multiple pages.

findings.title: Docs folder is disallowed in robots.txt for major AI user agents
evidence: 12 documentation URLs are present in the sitemap but blocked from access

findings.title: Localized docs pages point at inconsistent canonical targets
evidence: /docs/setup?lang=de canonicals to /de/docs/setup while other variants do not

findings.title: Comparison pages lack FAQ or Q&A schema
Pricing page has weak extractable answers and a thin pre-hydration shell
evidence: /pricing has one short paragraph and no structured question headings

findings.title: Setup docs page is stale on a core onboarding path
evidence: /docs/setup still shows outdated screenshots and an old Last updated date

findings.title: Cloudflare challenge route was discovered during the crawl
Cart and checkout URLs were discovered from legacy navigation links
Legacy pricing URL should be treated as cleanup noise unless it still ranks
llms.txt is absent
evidence: No llms.txt file was included in the artifact set
